seoTitle: How to Create a Jira Issue Automatically From an Email
metaDescription: Learn how to configure Jira to turn incoming emails into issues automatically, covering the email handler setup and creating tasks, bugs, or stories.
intro: Manually copying support requests or team emails into Jira wastes time that a proper email handler setup can save entirely. This guide covers configuring Jira to accept incoming emails and turning them automatically into tasks, bugs, or stories. It's built for teams who want support requests or stakeholder emails to land directly in their Jira backlog.

steps.heading: Understand why to create issues from email
steps.body: Turning emails into Jira issues cuts out manual data entry and makes sure support requests or team messages don't get lost.

steps.heading: Configure Jira to accept emails
steps.body: Set up the mail configuration in Jira's project or system settings so it can receive and process incoming messages.

steps.heading: Set up a custom email handler
steps.body: Create an email handler that defines how incoming messages are turned into issues, including which project and issue type they map to.

steps.heading: Turn incoming emails into tasks, bugs, or stories
steps.body: Test the handler by sending a sample email and confirming it creates the correct issue type in Jira.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for managing issues via email
steps.body: Keep subject lines and email formatting consistent so the handler reliably creates well-structured issues going forward.

faq.question: Do I need Jira admin access to set up email issue creation?
faq.answer: Yes, configuring the email handler typically requires administrator permissions on the Jira instance.

faq.question: Can any email automatically become a Jira issue?
faq.answer: Only emails sent to the configured address tied to your email handler will be converted, so you control which inbox feeds into Jira.

faq.question: What issue type does an email create by default?
faq.answer: The email handler lets you specify the default issue type, such as a task or bug, that incoming emails should be converted into.

faq.question: Can attachments in the email be added to the Jira issue?
faq.answer: Most email handler setups support carrying over attachments from the original email onto the created issue.
